title: Google Tag Manager Admin Access Set Up Guide

intro.text: We need admin access to your Google Tag Manager account to install conversion tracking tags for the new funnel. This is what connects your landing page activity to paid ads so we can track and optimise performance.
bullets: Fire conversion events when visitors take action on the LPL funnel
Pass conversion data back to the ads platform for campaign optimisation
Maintain clean, organised tracking separate from your other website tags
intro.helpText: If you have any troubles, feel free to email Tyce, or book a meeting directly

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: Sign in to Google Tag Manager at tagmanager.google.com

steps.label: Step 2
steps.title: Click the Admin gear icon for the correct account

steps.label: Step 4
steps.title: Click the blue + button, then select "Add users"

steps.label: Step 5 (Final Step)
steps.title: Enter "dev@landingpagelabs.co", select the Administrator and User role, click "Invitation"
